Obtain certified copy of criminal record from Fulton County Superior Court
Verify offense is on Georgia's restricted felony list (O.C.G.A. § 35-3-37)
Complete Petition for Record Restriction (Form RC-1)
File petition at Fulton County Courthouse with supporting documents
Pay filing fee and serve DA's office
Attend mandatory hearing — DA may object within 30 days
Obtain your case number from LACourtConnect or in person at court
Complete Form CR-180 (Petition for Dismissal)
File at the courthouse where you were convicted

Judge reviews petition — typically granted within 30 days
Receive signed order and keep certified copies

nextSteps: Verify felony is reducible to misdemeanor under PC 17(b)
File Motion to Reduce Felony to Misdemeanor (Form CR-180)
After reduction granted, file Petition for Dismissal (PC 1203.4)
Attend hearing — DA typically does not oppose non-violent cases
Receive final dismissal order within 60–90 days

Request criminal history from Texas DPS (txdps.state.tx.us)
Complete Petition for Order of Nondisclosure (Harris County form)
File at Harris County District Clerk, 201 Caroline St, Houston
Pay filing fee (~$300 for nondisclosure, $350 for expunction)
Serve all law enforcement agencies — court schedules hearing in 45–60 days
Texas does not allow expungement of most felony convictions
Contact Texas Board of Pardons and Paroles for clemency application
Consider Certificate of Relief application for employment barriers
Speak with a legal aid attorney — some specific felonies qualify for nondisclosure
Obtain Certificate of Disposition from the court where convicted
Complete CPL § 160.59 Sealing Application
Submit to court with supporting documents and $100 fee
DA's office has 45 days to object
Judge may schedule hearing or grant without hearing
Sealed records remain visible to law enforcement only
Request Certificate of Eligibility from Florida Dept. of Law Enforcement (fdle.state.fl.us)
Complete Petition to Seal/Expunge Criminal Record
File at Miami-Dade Circuit Court with $75 FDLE fee + court filing fee
